data.title: WuXi Biologics awarded for ESG disclosure by HERA 2025 in Hong Kong, setting higher standards for sustainability.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, WuXi Biologics (stock symbol: 2269.HK) in Hong Kong was recognized for its dedication to sustainability and transparency. The company was awarded the Outstanding ESG Disclosure at the Hong Kong ESG Reporting Awards (HERA) 2025, showcasing its commitment to environmental, social, and governance practices. This accolade signifies a significant achievement for WuXi Biologics and highlights its efforts in promoting responsible business operations.

data.title: Peter Schiff believes Bitcoin's rally is over as it fails to rise with tech stocks or gold, predicting a bearish future.
data.description: Renowned economist Peter Schiff declared that the rally of Bitcoin, a cryptocurrency, has come to an end, as it has failed to mirror the profits seen in tech stocks or traditional assets such as gold. Schiff expressed doubts about Bitcoin's future growth, stating that if it cannot rise alongside tech stocks or precious metals like gold and silver, then its upward trajectory seems unlikely. According to Schiff, the era of profiting from Bitcoin is over, and if it fails to increase in value, the only direction left is downward. He emphasized that if Bitcoin does not react positively to market movements, it is unlikely to see any significant gains in the future. Schiff's remarks suggest a pessimistic outlook for Bitcoin investors who may face losses if the trend continues.

data.title: After inflation adjustment, Bitcoin’s peak of $126K equals $99,848, not crossing $100K milestone.
data.description: According to Galaxy's Alex Thorn, even though Bitcoin reached a peak of $126,000, when adjusted for inflation, this translates to $99,848. This falls short of the significant milestone of reaching a six-figure value.

data.title: Ryan Ross appointed CEO of Total Wine & More, largest US independent retailer of alcohol. 25+ years experience.
data.description: A prominent independent retailer of fine wine, spirits, and beer in America, Total Wine & More revealed that Ryan Ross will become the company's Chief Executive Officer starting January 12, 2026. With over 25 years of experience in the industry, Ross will be taking on this new role at the Bethesda, Md.-based company.

data.title: El Salvador's President offers to release all prisoners to verify claims by Clinton on prison conditions.
data.description: El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele responded to Hillary Clinton's criticism of the nation's prison conditions and alleged torture. He proposed a solution by offering to release all prisoners to any country willing to accept them, including gang leaders, to verify the claims. Bukele stated that this would make it easier for journalists and NGOs to access former inmates for interviews. Until this occurs, Bukele emphasized his government's focus on prioritizing the human rights of Salvadoran citizens, ensuring they live free from gang influence. This development was shared in a recent post by Bukele. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
